reason: Batch 1 feature-page rebuild from source truth. Replaced 62-65 line boilerplate stubs with 171-265 real lines per file. vault_brain.md: 265 lines - full 20-function API reference, mission lifecycle state machine, step schema, council voting, forbidden owner tools, storage paths, atomic write logic, SR-002 deploy guard. taskmaster_brain.md: 171 lines - THINKER->PLANNER pipeline, THINKER_CASCADE contents, preserved-steps anti-regression, CE1 done_when enforcement, context injection list. coding_and_model_routing.md: 179 lines - api_route_request, api_cascade_query 4 phases, 9 provider adapters with env vars, private info filter. governance.md: 234 lines - all 11 CE components, api_read/write_mission_state, checkpoint ops, CE1 hard errors, S1-S5/E1/E4 rules, voting 30/30/40.

Batch 2 feature-page rebuild from source truth. email_intelligence.md: 225 lines - stage A/B0/B/C/D/E/F table, safety invariants (no_delete/no_send/no_write), all key API signatures, output storage layout, MATON credential env vars. security.md: 209 lines - provider boundary policy R1-R4/X1-X2, api_check_governance, all S1-S5/E1-E4 rules in table format, private info filter, human action block format. human_input_and_backlogs.md: 211 lines - Human_Input.txt format, status markers, backlog task block format, api_append_tasks deduplication, lint API, routing decision table. tool_runtime_and_risk.md: 186 lines - api_check_governance trigger fields, complete governance rule tables, checkpoint requirements, api_audit_provider_boundary, execution flow diagram.
